Article: Evangelion Memoria
[]: Evangelion Memoria             Quote Post by artesox » Wed Apr 23, 2014 1:02 am Anyway, Evangelion Memoria apparently closed down on March 31. RIP. It gave us a lot of nice images. [s:2p2moewh]And a lot of MariAsu[/s:2p2moewh]

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Apr 23, 2014 4:21 pm That's a little disappointing. Did anybody put together an image gallery of all the pics? I remember seeing a few here and there. Edit: New thread created to discuss, post pics, etc.

[]:             Quote Post by artesox » Wed Apr 23, 2014 7:11 pm I found it shutting down really odd and sudden. It had an enormous userbase and not only recently it was update (The last update I remember was the Valentines with Rei, Asuka and Mari)
